{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Trip
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Trip]] has never been part of the [[Imperial army]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
